creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
This has nothing to do with Cinnamon and everything to do with something, perhaps a stray OPTION, stray port(s)/package(s) or even portsnap lying to you about the state of your ports tree, in your environment. None of the ports listed are Cinnamon dependencies. Further, portsnap is deprecated (and already removed in 14-CURRENT); using the git repository directly is recommended.

net/mpich is not pulled in unless PARALLEL is enabled in science/hdf5.
